title: Guide Canonical Fix Report
fix_applied: Added alternates.canonical + robots: index,follow to generateMetadata() in guides/[slug]/page.tsx

fix_details.change: Added canonicalUrl = https://www.qfinhub.com/guides/{slug}, alternates.canonical, robots.index=true, robots.follow=true
fix_details.before: No canonical tag, no robots meta — pages served with no self-referencing canonical
fix_details.after: Every guide page now has self-referencing canonical + index,follow robots

verification_before_deploy.status: Code fix applied. Will verify 10 examples after Vercel deploy.
